news.t: Capture Exposure to the Top AI Adopters With These ETFs

holdings.infoBox: XLG is an equity ETF with a total of 54 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 13.26%, Apple at 11.56%, Microsoft at 7.69%, Amazon.com at 6.32%, and Alphabet at 5.76%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Top 50 ETF (XLG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Top 50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of the 50 largest US companies. XLG was launched on May 4, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Capture Exposure to the Top AI Adopters With These ETFs
data.text: At this point, advisors and investors are well aware that most, if not all, companies within the S&P 500 are fervently working to incorporate artificial intelligence into their workflows.
